creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am preparing the tcl86/tk86 ports and the ports are very similar to tcl85/tk85.

I request the following repocopies:

lang/tcl85 -> lang/tcl86
lang/tcl85-thread -> lang/tcl86-thread
x11-toolkits/tk85 -> x11-toolkits/tk86
x11-toolkits/tk85-thread -> x11-toolkits/tk86-thread
